title: Slovakian Mushroom Pasta
description: A hearty and flavorful pasta dish featuring the rich flavors of Slovakia, with tender mushrooms and a hint of spices.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil.
Cook the pasta according to package instructions until al dente.
In a large skillet, heat the glassy over medium heat.
Add the mushrooms and cook until they release their liquid and start to brown.
Add the Slovakian, garlic powder, and onion powder to the skillet and stir to combine.
Drain the cooked pasta and add it to the skillet with the mushroom mixture.
Toss to combine and season with salt and black pepper to taste.
